calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Name Change.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Clifford Y. Wang, Esq., appearing for Petitioner Jianhua Yu.
Petitioner Jianhua Yu present in court.
Petition for Name Change is withdraw with out prejudice. Court ordered the OSC re: Name Change off calendar and dissolved.
